---
title: "islr-ch04"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(ISLR)

data("Default")
Default
```

```{r}
glm(default ~ balance, data = Default)
```



```{r}
library(MASS)

res_lda <- lda(Species ~ ., data = iris)
res_lda
```

```{r}
attach(Smarket)
train <- Year < 2005

Smarket_2005 <- Smarket[!train, ]
```


```{r}
fit_lda <- lda(Direction ~ Lag1 + Lag2, data = Smarket, subset = train)
fit_lda

prd_lda <- predict(fit_lda, Smarket_2005)
names(prd_lda)
head(prd_lda$posterior)
head(prd_lda$class)
head(prd_lda$x)
```
